prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年浙江大学在上海综合类最低录取位次分别为约1812名→2335名→2393名→2684名→4096名。2021至2024年位次在1800–2700名区间小幅波动，整体呈缓慢                         后移趋势；2025年出现大幅后移，较2024年下降约1412名，主要受选科要求调整为"物理、化学(2科必选)"后上海考生结构变化影响。2025年基准位次约4096名；浙江大学在上海综合类招生计划：2021年24人、2022年19人、2023年19人、2024年21人、2025年23人；2026年计划为24人，较2025年小幅扩招1人（约+4.3%），扩招                        幅度有限，对缓解竞争作用微弱。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 浙江大学为985工程、211工程、国家双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名连续多年稳居第3名（2021–2026年均第3），属于全                         国顶尖高校层次，对高分考生吸引力极强；2026年声誉评价为偏负面，涉及学术不端、师德师风、校园安全等舆情事件，可能对部分考生报考心理产生一定抑制                        作用；但抖音热度排名第14（评价"高热"），短视频平台曝光量大，整体关注度仍处高位。2021–2025年未见明显投档断档记录；浙江大学拥有大量A+/A/A-学科                        ，包括计算机科学与技术A+、软件工程A+、控制科学与工程A+、光学工程A+、动力工程及工程热物理A+、土木工程A+、数学A+、临床医学A、法学A、工商管理A等，学科实力全面                         顶尖，对各类专业方向考生均有强大吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热推荐；临床医学、口腔医学等医学类专业热度稳                         定偏热；金融/财经/经济类呈分化观望。上海2026年高考考生总数约66700人，较2025年49276人增长约35%，竞争显著加剧；浙江大学位于浙江省杭州市，非上海本地高校，上海考生报考属于跨省就读。该校在全国范围内招生，在上海的招生计划占比较小（约24人），属于典型                        的外省顶尖名校招生模式，不存在明显的地域偏好偏移。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的走势、2026年招生计划仅小幅扩招（+4.3%）、上海考生总数大幅增长约35%                        导致竞争加剧、以及浙大顶尖层次持续吸引高分考生等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年基准4096名基础上继续后移。预测最低位次约4303名，波动区间3803–4803名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（竺可桢学院图灵班）（计算机科学与技术专业）
- 人工智能（荣誉项目班/普通班）
- 工科试验班（信息）（含计算机科学与技术、信息安全、软件工程等）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 理科试验班类（含商务大数据分析双学士学位项目）（含数学与应用数学、统计学等）
- 工科试验班（智能光电芯片及创新班）（光电信息科学与工程专业）
- 社会科学试验班（竺可桢学院人文社科实验班）（含经济学、法学等）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 社会科学试验班（含数字金融双学士学位项目）（含经济学、金融学、会计学、法学等）
- 社会科学试验班（智能财务荣誉项目班）（会计学专业）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间3803–4803名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如3800名以内）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（图灵班、人工                        智能）；位次接近区间上限（如4800名左右）应以三档社科类专业为主，兼顾二档理科试验班。浙大各专业组选科要求不同（物化必选/不限），填报时需注意匹配自身选科。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Zhejiang University in Shanghai's comprehensive category were approximately 1812 → 2335 → 2393 → 2684 → 4096. From 2021 to 2024, rankings fluctuated slightly within the 1800–2700 range, showing a slow overall backward trend; in 2025, there was a significant backward shift, dropping about 1412 places compared to 2024, mainly due to the adjustment of subject requirements to "Physics, Chemistry (2 subjects required)" affecting the structure of Shanghai candidates. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 4096; Zhejiang University's enrollment plan in Shanghai's comprehensive category: 24 in 2021, 19 in 2022, 19 in 2023, 21 in 2024, 23 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 24, a slight increase of 1 student (about +4.3%) compared to 2025, with limited expansion having a weak effect on alleviating competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhejiang University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and national Double First-Class university. It has consistently ranked 3rd in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings for many years (3rd from 2021 to 2026), placing it among the top-tier universities in the country, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates; in 2026, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving incidents such as academic misconduct, teacher ethics, and campus safety, which may partially suppress some candidates' willingness to apply; however, its Douyin popularity ranks 14th (rated as "high heat"), with significant exposure on short video platforms, maintaining high overall attention. From 2021 to 2025, there were no obvious records of admission gaps; Zhejiang University has numerous A+/A/A- disciplines, including Computer Science and Technology A+, Software Engineering A+, Control Science and Engineering A+, Optical Engineering A+, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics A+, Civil Engineering A+, Mathematics A+, Clinical Medicine A, Law A, Business Administration A, etc., with comprehensive top-tier disciplinary strength, strongly attracting candidates from various professional directions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended; medical majors like Clinical Medicine and Stomatology remain steadily popular; finance/economics/business majors show differentiation and wait-and-see attitudes. In 2026, the total number of Shanghai Gaokao candidates is about 66,700, an increase of about 35% from 49,276 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; Zhejiang University is located in Hangzhou, Zhejiang Province, not a local Shanghai university, so Shanghai candidates applying are considered cross-provincial enrollment. The university recruits nationwide, with a relatively small enrollment plan in Shanghai (about 24 students), typical of top-tier out-of-province university enrollment models, without significant regional preference bias.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward trend in rankings in 2025, the slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (+4.3%), the substantial increase of about 35% in the total number of Shanghai candidates leading to intensified competition, and the continuous strong attraction of Zhejiang University's top-tier status to high-scoring candidates, the minimum admission ranking for 2026 is expected to continue moving backward from the 2025 baseline of 4096. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4303, with a fluctuation range of 3803–4803.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Chu Kochen Honors College Turing Class) (Computer Science and Technology major)
- Artificial Intelligence (Honors Project Class/Regular Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Information) (including Computer Science and Technology, Information Security, Software Engineering, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Science Experimental Class (including Business Big Data Analysis Dual Bachelor's Degree Program) (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Statistics, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Smart Optoelectronic Chip and Innovation Class) (Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering major)
- Social Science Experimental Class (Chu Kochen Honors College Humanities and Social Sciences Experimental Class) (including Economics, Law, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Social Science Experimental Class (including Digital Finance Dual Bachelor's Degree Program) (including Economics, Finance, Accounting, Law, etc.)
- Social Science Experimental Class (Smart Finance Honors Project Class) (Accounting major)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 3803–4803, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 3800), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors (Turing Class, Artificial Intelligence); if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 4800), you should mainly choose Tier 3 social science majors, supplemented by Tier 2 science experimental classes. Different major groups at Zhejiang University have different subject requirements (Physics and Chemistry required/No restrictions), so you need to match your own subject choices when filling in the application.
